query:
INSERT INTO room_summary_state (room_id, event_type, state_key, event_id, content, updated_ts)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)
            ON CONFLICT (room_id, event_type, state_key) DO UPDATE SET
                event_id = EXCLUDED.event_id,
                content = EXCLUDED.content,
                updated_ts = EXCLUDED.updated_ts
            RETURNING id as "id!", room_id as "room_id!", event_type as "event_type!",
                      state_key as "state_key!", event_id as "event_id?",
                      COALESCE(content, '{}'::jsonb) as "content!", updated_ts as "updated_ts!"
